item.title: Did you know: When cats sit in a loaf position, they’re actually conserving body heat and protecting their vital organs. So, a cute loaf usually means your cat feels safe, warm, and comfortable! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catloaf
item.description: By @1anirank1: Did you know: When cats sit in a loaf position, they’re actually conserving body heat and protecting their vital organs. So, a cute loaf usually means your cat feels safe, warm, and comfortable! #fyp #ranking #funnyanimals #catsoftiktok #catloaf
